description_long: This is a modern swivel chair featuring a tall, angular backrest and a wide, cushioned seat, both upholstered in a dark gray material. The chair is supported by a sturdy central column that branches out into a five-legged star-shaped base, each leg ending in a red caster for mobility. The armrests are geometric, rectangular, and appear to be made of a blue metal or plastic, providing both support and a visual accent. The seat and backrest are contoured for ergonomic comfort, with the backrest extending high to support the upper back and shoulders. The base and armrests contrast with the darker seat, giving the chair a contemporary, professional look suitable for office or urban indoor environments. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, with visible mechanisms beneath the seat hinting at possible adjustability.
description: A modern swivel chair with a tall, angular gray backrest, blue geometric armrests, and a five-legged base with red casters. The chair combines ergonomic comfort with a contemporary, professional appearance.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tall, angular backrest and the five-legged base with red casters.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the contoured seat, armrest structure, and visible adjustment mechanism beneath the seat.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide seat, high backrest, and both blue armrests clearly.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest, seat contour, and the central support column with base details.
attribute_central_support_column: A cylindrical black metal column beneath the seat, likely telescoping for height adjustment, connecting to a five-legged base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, angular, and straight-edged backrest with a dark gray fabric finish, high enough to support the upper back and shoulders, with subtle contouring for comfort.
attribute_armrest_style: Rectangular, blue armrests made of metal or plastic, attached to the seat and backrest, with a geometric, open-sided design.
